exhibits.name: Form of Franchise Agreement

sub_exhibits.name: Form of Joinder to Franchise Agreement

exhibits.notes: 21 sections, 62 pages. Contains AI usage clause (Section 8.6).

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Two sets: FY2024/2023 (pages 162-173) and FY2023/2022 (pages 174-185). Audited by RSM US LLP. Image-based — no text layer. Rendered via pdftoppm.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and State Agents for Service of Process
State Addenda to FDD
exhibits.notes: 15 states with material overrides. Key override families: forum selection, governing law, noncompete, general release, termination, damages.

exhibits.name: Operations Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Image-based. Manual is ~425 pages. TOC only in exhibit.

exhibits.name: List of Current Franchisees
exhibits.notes: PII — names, emails, phone numbers by state. 23 pages.

exhibits.name: Franchisees Who Have Left the System
exhibits.notes: Names, dates, reasons for departure. 3 pages.

exhibits.name: Franchise Disclosure Acknowledgment Statement
exhibits.notes: Questionnaire format — background check, disclosure acknowledgment.

exhibits.name: Minimum Insurance Requirements (United States)
exhibits.notes: CGL $1M/$1M occurrence/aggregate. E&O $1M/$1M. Additional insured endorsement required.
